data.content: Reduced the global site radius token for a tighter overall shape language, changed Agent Pools and Defaults headings from gradient-clipped text to solid text, and wrapped the Repositories section in a matching outlined inner container while aligning its outer card border with the other settings sections. Verified with bun run lint (warnings only, 0 errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and NODE_ENV=production bun run build. Pushed directly to origin/main as 31079cd.
